sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55420" key="kata/tonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάτονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n55420.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stretching down: depressed</tr_>, i.e. less high than broad, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνάτονος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.10.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
